scores.correctness_notes: Covers the core change/task model well with good detail on statuses. Missing key gold standard items: GET /v1/changes/{id}/wait (describes POST instead of GET), filtering via ?select=in-progress, and change-update notices via long-poll. The ops library coverage is good but focuses on service methods rather than the broader model.
scores.hallucination_notes: POST /v1/changes/{id}/wait — the gold standard specifies GET not POST for the wait endpoint. Minor inaccuracy on HTTP method.
